name: Chris Adams
bio: Chris is Chief Product and Technology Officer at Net Natives, a Brighton-based digital agency helping universities attract students globally.

name: Emmanuel Ide
bio: Emmanuel leads engineering at Glint Pay, a platform that allows users to buy, save, and spend physical gold and silver as an everyday currency.

name: Martyn Fagg
bio: Martyn is CIO at Tillo, the global gift card network powering rewards, incentives and employee benefits for the world's leading brands.

name: Glen De Cauwsemaecker
bio: Glen is CTO at Plabayo, building Rama, an actively maintained open source Rust network framework.
